zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Cromwell於1438年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾諾維爾時，他的父親Sir William Cromwell22歲，母親Margaret Smythe24歲。他於大約1455年與Joan Smythe在英國英格蘭素瑞普特尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年在他的家鄉享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾希布萊頓希布萊頓 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Cromwell于1438年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾諾維爾时，他的父亲Sir William Cromwell22岁，母亲Margaret Smythe24岁。他于大约1455年与Joan Smythe在英国英格兰素瑞普特尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年在他的家乡享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾希布萊頓希布萊頓 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Cromwell was born in 1438, in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir William Cromwell, was 22 and his mother, Margaret Smythe, was 24. He married Joan Smythe about 1455, in Putney, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1480, in his hometown, at the age of 42, and was buried in Himbleton Churchyard, Himbleton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Cromwell est né en 1438, à Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Cromwell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Smythe, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Smythe environ 1455, à Putney, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1480, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Himbleton Churchyard, Himbleton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Cromwell 1438 in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Cromwell 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Smythe 24. Er hat um 1455 in Putney, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Joan Smythe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1480 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Himbleton Churchyard, Himbleton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cromwell è nato il nel 1438 nel Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Cromwell, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Smythe, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan Smythe circa 1455, nel Putney, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1480, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Himbleton Churchyard, Himbleton, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cromwellが1438年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノーウエルで生まれた時，父Sir William Cromwellは22歳，母Margaret Smytheは24歳であった。約1455年にイギリスイギリススリープウトニーでJoan Smytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年に故郷で42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアヒンブレトンヒンブレトン チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Wimbledon Churchyard: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 히블레턴 히블레턴 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cromwell(이)가 1438년 영국 노틴그함실르 노웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Cromwell(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Smythe(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 풋니에서 Joan Smythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 히블레턴 히블레턴 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cromwell nasceu em 1438, em Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Cromwell, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Smythe, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Smythe aproximadamente 1455, em Putney, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1480, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Himbleton Churchyard, Himbleton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Engla: карлтон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Wimbledon Churchyard: химблетон чурчярд, химблетон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Cromwell родился в 1438 г. в местности норвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Cromwell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Smythe, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Smythe около 1455 г. в местности путни, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1480 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности химблетон чурчярд, химблетон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Cromwell nació en 1438, en Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Cromwell, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Smythe, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Smythe aproximadamente 1455, en Putney, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1480, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Himbleton Churchyard, Himbleton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
